strengths: Minimal, focused change — 4 lines added to CLASSIFY_SYSTEM_PROMPT plus 3 tests. Zero scope creep.
Clear system prompt structure: status-report entry mirrors research-report format, rule 4 added, union type updated.
Tests cover all 3 DELIVERABLE scenarios: system prompt assertion (failability guard), contract guard, and research-report regression.
Multilingual support explicitly noted in the status-report template description (Indonesian, Spanish, French).

issues.description: No explicit non-English (e.g. Indonesian 'laporan status') test case, though the spec's [derived] DELIVERABLE mentions it. The system prompt already handles multilingual intent, and the LLM is mocked so only the contract is tested — this is acceptable but worth noting.
